description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build OSW-OS that runs on a schedule, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses two jobs: Find-feature and build-OSW. The Find-feature job checks out the repository, filters for i8n changes, and outputs languages and models. The build-OSW job uses these outputs to create a matrix build across multiple OS, models, and languages, checking out the repository, caching pip and PlatformIO, setting up Python, installing PlatformIO, and compiling firmware.
